1838580.name: Raven's Journey
1838580.description:
Raven’s Journey is a realistic 3D story driven action-adventure RPG with archery, magic, tons of guns and difficult moral choices which shape your destiny.

Embark on a journey across a vast, desolate landscape filled with hidden secrets and enigmatic characters. Trust your instincts to guide you to your journey’s end while you learn your own secrets cleverly hidden by your own tormented mind. Your choices weave a complex tapestry of chaos or harmony, shaping not only your journey but the fate of the world itself

Explore your deepest beliefs & greatest fears as you journey through this gorgeous open world full of adventure, challenges, combat and quests.

Examine the brightest & darkest sides of human nature as you encounter great good & face ultimate evil.

Battle hordes of demons, mutants and other nasty things as you struggle to discover what went wrong with the world. Discover the identity of your true enemy & uncover their evil agenda. Master your mysterious powers and confront the ultimate evil who is responsible for bringing chaos to the world.  Can you restore balance to the world? Do you even want to?

Remember: Broken by an excruciatingly painful, now forgotten, past, will you remember who you are before an unknown enemy destroys you again? How do you even fight what you cannot remember? How can you trust your future when you are unsure of your past?

Struggle to understand your nightmares and remember your past. Can you remember in time to survive?

Discover relics and locations that resonate with your true self, begin to unravel your haunting memories and unlock primeval skills. Recover your memories so you can uncover the truth.

Survive encounters with mysterious creatures and a harsh chaotic world as you unravel your broken memories and try to master your mysterious powers.

Learn how your identity shapes the very fabric of reality as you remember a forgotten past and unlock powerful abilities which can influence the balance of light and darkness; harmony and chaos. Learn to survive long enough to confront the ultimate evil in Raven’s Journey.
1838580.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言

categories.description: 无需应对快速反应事件
